UserPromptSubmit.matcher: commit|git commit|message de commit|fais un commit

hooks.command: echo 'bebou-commit: use bebou-commit skill for this commit message'

UserPromptSubmit.matcher: review|regarde mon code|qu'est ce que t'en penses|PR review

hooks.command: echo 'bebou-review: use bebou-review skill for this code review'
